Rosehip, Jojoba and Avocado Oils soften and lightly hydrate, while Chamomile and Aloe Vera help soothe and comfort the skin. Eucalyptus & Tea Tree A refreshing body wash that enlivens the senses while cleansing the skin. Borage, Evening Primrose and Grape Seed Oils purify and hydrate, while Aloe Vera provides calming hydration for clean, fresh skin. Ylang Ylang & Cedar A soothing, aromatic wash combining ylang ylang and cedarwood notes with nourishing Jojoba, Sunflower and Camellia Oils. The soap-free formula hydrates, softens and leaves skin feeling refreshed and lightly soothed. Lather over the body and rinse thoroughly. [VALUE SET OF 3] Sukin Botanical Body Wash Collection (1L X 3) – Hydrating, soap-free wash with Aloe Vera for soft, refreshed skin (Signature | Eucalyptus & Tea Tree | Ylang Ylang & Cedar)

Botanical Signature

A soap-free body wash enriched with aromatic botanicals to gently cleanse without drying. Rosehip, Jojoba and Avocado Oils soften and lightly hydrate, while Chamomile and Aloe Vera help soothe and comfort the skin.

Eucalyptus & Tea Tree

A refreshing body wash that enlivens the senses while cleansing the skin. Borage, Evening Primrose and Grape Seed Oils purify and hydrate, while Aloe Vera provides calming hydration for clean, fresh skin.

Ylang Ylang & Cedar

A soothing, aromatic wash combining ylang ylang and cedarwood notes with nourishing Jojoba, Sunflower and Camellia Oils. The soap-free formula hydrates, softens and leaves skin feeling refreshed and lightly soothed.

Benefits

- Soap-free formulas suitable for daily cleansing

- Enriched with botanical oils to hydrate and soften skin

- Aloe Vera and botanical extracts help soothe and comfort

- Fragrance options to suit different moods

How to Use

Apply to hands or a sponge in the shower or bath. Lather over the body and rinse thoroughly.

Ingredients

Botanical Signature

Water (Aqua), Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Decyl Glucoside, PEG-150 Pentaerythrityl Tetrastearate, Glycerin, Rosa Canina Fruit Oil (Rosehip), Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Glycine Soja (Soybean) Oil, Chamomilla Recutita (Matricaria) Flower Extract, Yucca Schidigera Root Extract, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Extract, Citrus Tangerina Peel Oil, Citrus Nobilis Peel Oil, Lavandula Angustifolia Oil, Vanillin, Vanilla Planifolia Fruit Extract, Phenoxyethanol, Benzyl Alcohol, Limonene*, Linalool* *natural component of essential oils

Eucalyptus & Tea Tree

Water (Aqua), Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Lauroyl Methyl Isethionate, Glycerin, Borago Officinalis Seed Oil (Borage), Oenothera Biennis (Evening Primrose) Oil, Vitis Vinifera Seed Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Glycine Soja Oil, Hamamelis Virginiana Leaf Extract, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract, Artemisia Absinthium Extract, Zingiber Officinale Root Extract, Mentha Piperita Leaf Extract, Melaleuca Alternifolia Leaf Oil, Leuconostoc/Radish Root Ferment Filtrate, Fragrance (Parfum)*, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Citric Acid, Phenoxyethanol, Benzyl Alcohol, Limonene**, Linalool**.

*natural fragrance **component of natural fragrance

Ylang Ylang & Cedar

product.desc:
[VALUE SET OF 3] Sukin Botanical Body Wash Collection (1L X 3) – Hydrating, soap-free wash with Aloe Vera for soft, refreshed skin (Signature | Eucalyptus & Tea Tree | Ylang Ylang & Cedar)

Botanical Signature

A soap-free body wash enriched with aromatic botanicals to gently cleanse without drying. Rosehip, Jojoba and Avocado Oils soften and lightly hydrate, while Chamomile and Aloe Vera help soothe and comfort the skin.

Eucalyptus & Tea Tree

A refreshing body wash that enlivens the senses while cleansing the skin. Borage, Evening Primrose and Grape Seed Oils purify and hydrate, while Aloe Vera provides calming hydration for clean, fresh skin.

Ylang Ylang & Cedar

A soothing, aromatic wash combining ylang ylang and cedarwood notes with nourishing Jojoba, Sunflower and Camellia Oils. The soap-free formula hydrates, softens and leaves skin feeling refreshed and lightly soothed.

Benefits

- Soap-free formulas suitable for daily cleansing

- Enriched with botanical oils to hydrate and soften skin

- Aloe Vera and botanical extracts help soothe and comfort

- Fragrance options to suit different moods

How to Use

Apply to hands or a sponge in the shower or bath. Lather over the body and rinse thoroughly.

Ingredients

Botanical Signature

Water (Aqua), Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Decyl Glucoside, PEG-150 Pentaerythrityl Tetrastearate, Glycerin, Rosa Canina Fruit Oil (Rosehip), Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Glycine Soja (Soybean) Oil, Chamomilla Recutita (Matricaria) Flower Extract, Yucca Schidigera Root Extract, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Extract, Citrus Tangerina Peel Oil, Citrus Nobilis Peel Oil, Lavandula Angustifolia Oil, Vanillin, Vanilla Planifolia Fruit Extract, Phenoxyethanol, Benzyl Alcohol, Limonene*, Linalool* *natural component of essential oils

Eucalyptus & Tea Tree

Water (Aqua), Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Lauroyl Methyl Isethionate, Glycerin, Borago Officinalis Seed Oil (Borage), Oenothera Biennis (Evening Primrose) Oil, Vitis Vinifera Seed Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Glycine Soja Oil, Hamamelis Virginiana Leaf Extract, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract, Artemisia Absinthium Extract, Zingiber Officinale Root Extract, Mentha Piperita Leaf Extract, Melaleuca Alternifolia Leaf Oil, Leuconostoc/Radish Root Ferment Filtrate, Fragrance (Parfum)*, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Citric Acid, Phenoxyethanol, Benzyl Alcohol, Limonene**, Linalool**.

*natural fragrance **component of natural fragrance

Ylang Ylang & Cedar

Water (Aqua), Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Lauroyl Methyl Isethionate, Glycerin, Camellia Oleifera Seed Oil, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Glycine Soja Oil, Chamomilla Recutita Flower Extract, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Extract, Fragrance (Parfum)*, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Citric Acid, Phenoxyethanol, Benzyl Alcohol, Geraniol**, Limonene**, Linalool**. *natural fragrance **component of natural fragrance

page_json.description: Sukin. Bath and Body Works Official Store: Available in a variety of colors and sizes. If you're not sure which color you choose to choose, you can choose to buy your favorite bath and body work products. Bath and Body Works Aromatherapy: Infused with a hint of eucalyptus, which makes it a natural addition to your body. Body Wash for Sensitive Skin: Nourishes the skin, delivers a luxurious, long-lasting effect for the skin. The Body Shop Official Store: Available in a variety of colors. Buy with confidence and feel confidently when you are in the body shop. Bodyshop Official Store: If you don't like to buy a product, you can contact us if you are not satisfied with a purchase. Brand: Sukin

1907619131.title: Bundle of 4 Dove Body Wash 1L
1907619131.detail_text: Dove Body Wash 1L Dove Body Wash with Nutrium Moisture Experience the difference of New Body Wash with Nutrium Moisture. Its ultra mild cleansers are designed to wash away dirt ad oil, not your skin's natural moisture. Dove® Beauty Nourishing Body Wash with Nutrium Moisture® features 100% skin natural moisturizers that can absorb completely to nourish skin deep down. Plus, an improved formula gives your skin our proven best care: our gentlest cleansers ever, a rich lather and a clean rinse to leave your skin feeling soft and smooth.
1907619131.detail_html:
Dove Body Wash 1L

Dove Body Wash with Nutrium Moisture Experience the difference of New Body Wash with Nutrium Moisture.

Its ultra mild cleansers are designed to wash away dirt ad oil, not your skin's natural moisture.

Dove® Beauty Nourishing Body Wash with Nutrium Moisture® features 100% skin natural moisturizers that can absorb completely to nourish skin deep down.

Plus, an improved formula gives your skin our proven best care: our gentlest cleansers ever, a rich lather and a clean rinse to leave your skin feeling soft and smooth.

detail_blocks.text: Dove Body Wash 1L Dove Body Wash with Nutrium Moisture Experience the difference of New Body Wash with Nutrium Moisture. Its ultra mild cleansers are designed to wash away dirt ad oil, not your skin's natural moisture. Dove® Beauty Nourishing Body Wash with Nutrium Moisture® features 100% skin natural moisturizers that can absorb completely to nourish skin deep down. 570802637.title: [Bundle of 4] Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel 473ml (Available in 6 variants)
570802637.detail_text: This top-selling shower and bath gel is one of our best body wash products. And you can count on this body cleanser to soften and condition your skin, without leaving behind any heavy residue. Using a rich lather, it harnesses the fragrance of spices, fruits and herbs to awaken your senses and refresh your entire body, turning an ordinary shower into a pampering spa experience. How to use: ● IN THE SHOWER: Smooth on body with moistened hands, puff or washcloth. Gently lather, then rinse. ● IN THE BATH: Dipense into running water. ● FOR SHAVING LEGS: Use as a skin-smoothing shaving gel. Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel Gold Lush ● cleans, softens & conditions skin without a heavy leave-behind residue. ● Your skin is left in better condition, feeling softer, smoother & renewed. ● The fragrant blend of spices, fruits & herbs provides a clean burst that awakens your senses & refreshes your entire body. Neutrogena Rainbath Renewing Shower And Bath Gel Pear And Green Tea For Spa-Like Indulgence ● softens & conditions skin without a heavy leave-behind residue. ● With its unique fragrance blend of pear & green tea, Rainbath® bath gel works to renew the look and feel of your skin as the rich, moisturizing lather rinses clean. ● Your skin is left in better condition, feeling softer, smoother & truly renewed. Neutrogena Rainbath Replenishing Shower And Bath Gel Ocean Mist For Spa-Like Indulgence ● cleans skin without leaving behind a heavy residue – skin is left feeling soft and conditioned. ● The refreshing, tropical ocean mist fragrance enlivens the senses, while the rich, creamy lather rinses clean to wash the day away ● Replenish the look of your skin. Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel Pomegranate ● softens and conditions skin without a heavy leave-behind residue. ● With its fresh pomegranate fragrance, Rainbath ® rejuvenates the look and feel of your skin with a moisturizing lather. ● Your skin is left in better condition feeling softer, smoother and rejuvenated. Collection includes: Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel Gold Lush 473ml x 4 Neutrogena Rainbath Renewing Shower And Bath Gel Pear And Green Tea For Spa-Like Indulgence 473ml x 4 Neutrogena Rainbath Replenishing Shower And Bath Gel Ocean Mist For Spa-Like Indulgence 473ml x 4 Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel Pomegranate 473ml x 4 Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel 473ml (Gold Lush x 2, Pear & Green Tea x 2) Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel Collection 473ml (Gold Lush, Ocean Mist, Pomegranate , Pear & Green Tea)
570802637.detail_html:
This top-selling shower and bath gel is one of our best body wash products. And you can count on this body cleanser to soften and condition your skin, without leaving behind any heavy residue. Using a rich lather, it harnesses the fragrance of spices, fruits and herbs to awaken your senses and refresh your entire body, turning an ordinary shower into a pampering spa experience.

How to use:

● IN THE SHOWER: Smooth on body with moistened hands, puff or washcloth. Gently lather, then rinse.

● IN THE BATH: Dipense into running water.

● FOR SHAVING LEGS: Use as a skin-smoothing shaving gel.

Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel Gold Lush

● cleans, softens & conditions skin without a heavy leave-behind residue.

● Your skin is left in better condition, feeling softer, smoother & renewed.

● The fragrant blend of spices, fruits & herbs provides a clean burst that awakens your senses & refreshes your entire body.

Neutrogena Rainbath Renewing Shower And Bath Gel Pear And Green Tea For Spa-Like Indulgence

● softens & conditions skin without a heavy leave-behind residue.

● With its unique fragrance blend of pear & green tea, Rainbath® bath gel works to renew the look and feel of your skin as the rich, moisturizing lather rinses clean.

● Your skin is left in better condition, feeling softer, smoother & truly renewed.

Neutrogena Rainbath Replenishing Shower And Bath Gel Ocean Mist For Spa-Like Indulgence

● cleans skin without leaving behind a heavy residue – skin is left feeling soft and conditioned.

● The refreshing, tropical ocean mist fragrance enlivens the senses, while the rich, creamy lather rinses clean to wash the day away

● Replenish the look of your skin.

Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel Pomegranate

● softens and conditions skin without a heavy leave-behind residue.

● With its fresh pomegranate fragrance, Rainbath ® rejuvenates the look and feel of your skin with a moisturizing lather.

● Your skin is left in better condition feeling softer, smoother and rejuvenated.

Collection includes:

Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel Gold Lush 473ml x 4

Neutrogena Rainbath Renewing Shower And Bath Gel Pear And Green Tea For Spa-Like Indulgence 473ml x 4

Neutrogena Rainbath Replenishing Shower And Bath Gel Ocean Mist For Spa-Like Indulgence 473ml x 4

Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel Pomegranate 473ml x 4

Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel 473ml (Gold Lush x 2, Pear & Green Tea x 2)

Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel Collection 473ml (Gold Lush, Ocean Mist, Pomegranate, Pear & Green Tea)

product.desc:
This top-selling shower and bath gel is one of our best body wash products. And you can count on this body cleanser to soften and condition your skin, without leaving behind any heavy residue. Using a rich lather, it harnesses the fragrance of spices, fruits and herbs to awaken your senses and refresh your entire body, turning an ordinary shower into a pampering spa experience.

How to use:

● IN THE SHOWER: Smooth on body with moistened hands, puff or washcloth. Gently lather, then rinse.

● IN THE BATH: Dipense into running water.

● FOR SHAVING LEGS: Use as a skin-smoothing shaving gel.

Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel Gold Lush

● cleans, softens & conditions skin without a heavy leave-behind residue.

● Your skin is left in better condition, feeling softer, smoother & renewed.

● The fragrant blend of spices, fruits & herbs provides a clean burst that awakens your senses & refreshes your entire body.

Neutrogena Rainbath Renewing Shower And Bath Gel Pear And Green Tea For Spa-Like Indulgence

● softens & conditions skin without a heavy leave-behind residue.

● With its unique fragrance blend of pear & green tea, Rainbath® bath gel works to renew the look and feel of your skin as the rich, moisturizing lather rinses clean.

● Your skin is left in better condition, feeling softer, smoother & truly renewed.

Neutrogena Rainbath Replenishing Shower And Bath Gel Ocean Mist For Spa-Like Indulgence

● cleans skin without leaving behind a heavy residue – skin is left feeling soft and conditioned.

● The refreshing, tropical ocean mist fragrance enlivens the senses, while the rich, creamy lather rinses clean to wash the day away

● Replenish the look of your skin.

Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel Pomegranate

● softens and conditions skin without a heavy leave-behind residue.

● With its fresh pomegranate fragrance, Rainbath ® rejuvenates the look and feel of your skin with a moisturizing lather.

● Your skin is left in better condition feeling softer, smoother and rejuvenated.

Collection includes:

Neutrogena Rainbath Refreshing Shower and Bath Gel Gold Lush 473ml x 4

Neutrogena Rainbath Renewing Shower And Bath Gel Pear And Green Tea For Spa-Like Indulgence 473ml x 4

Neutrogena Rainbath Replenishing Shower And Bath Gel Ocean Mist For Spa-Like Indulgence 473ml x 4

643950239.title: [Adult/Bundle] Suu Balm Creamy Body Wash (Cooling & Gentle) 3 x 840ml | Eczema, Itchy, Dry or Sensitive Skin
643950239.detail_text: EXPIRY DATE Apr 2029 WHAT'S IN THE BUNDLE: 3 x Suu Balm Creamy Body Wash (Cooling & Gentle) 840ml UPGRADE YOUR BODY WASH! Suu Balm Creamy Body Wash (Cooling & Gentle) is ideal for gentle cleansing on sensitive and dry skin, leaving your skin feeling soothed and refreshed. This soap, sulfate, fragrance, paraben, and preservative-free cream body wash is gentle and suitable for use on all skin types, especially sensitive skin! KEY HIGHLIGHTS OF ADULT BODY WASH: Formulated by the National Skin Centre (NSC), Singapore Menthol for soothing, cooling relief for dry and sensitive skin Contains 5 moisturising ingredients such as Shea Butter and Sodium Hyaluronate Suitable for eczema-prone and sensitive skin with soap, sulfate, paraben, preservative, and fragrance-free formula Ultra-gentle, rich, creamy texture SUITABLE FOR: Dry, itchy, sensitive, and eczema-prone skin Psoriasis Aging Skin WHEN AND HOW TO USE: Use when showering or bathing, daily or more often if needed, apply to the body to gently cleanse, and then rinse off Do not use it if you are allergic to any of the ingredients For best results, keep your showers short and do not use water that’s too hot After showering, pat your skin dry and apply your Suu Balm Ceramide Moisturiser (Rapid Itch Relief) to body regions with itch or dryness INGREDIENTS CAREFULLY CHOSEN TO BE SUITABLE FOR SENSITIVE AND PROBLEMATIC SKIN: Water, Cetyl Alcohol, Butylene Glycol, Sodium Lauroyl Methyl Isethionate, Stearyl Alcohol, Hydroxyacetophenone, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Menthol, Caprylyl Glycol, Lactic Acid, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea Butter), Betaine, Sodium Hyaluronate
643950239.detail_html:
EXPIRY DATE

  • Apr 2029

WHAT'S IN THE BUNDLE:

  • 3 x Suu Balm Creamy Body Wash (Cooling & Gentle) 840ml

UPGRADE YOUR BODY WASH!

Suu Balm Creamy Body Wash (Cooling & Gentle) is ideal for gentle cleansing on sensitive and dry skin, leaving your skin feeling soothed and refreshed. This soap, sulfate, fragrance, paraben, and preservative-free cream body wash is gentle and suitable for use on all skin types, especially sensitive skin!

KEY HIGHLIGHTS OF ADULT BODY WASH:

  • Formulated by the National Skin Centre (NSC), Singapore
  • Menthol for soothing, cooling relief for dry and sensitive skin
  • Contains 5 moisturising ingredients such as Shea Butter and Sodium Hyaluronate
  • Suitable for eczema-prone and sensitive skin with soap, sulfate, paraben, preservative, and fragrance-free formula
  • Ultra-gentle, rich, creamy texture

SUITABLE FOR:

  • Dry, itchy, sensitive, and eczema-prone skin
  • Psoriasis
  • Aging Skin

WHEN AND HOW TO USE:

  • Use when showering or bathing, daily or more often if needed, apply to the body to gently cleanse, and then rinse off
  • Do not use it if you are allergic to any of the ingredients
  • For best results, keep your showers short and do not use water that’s too hot
  • After showering, pat your skin dry and apply your Suu Balm Ceramide Moisturiser (Rapid Itch Relief) to body regions with itch or dryness

INGREDIENTS CAREFULLY CHOSEN TO BE SUITABLE FOR SENSITIVE AND PROBLEMATIC SKIN:

Water, Cetyl Alcohol, Butylene Glycol, Sodium Lauroyl Methyl Isethionate, Stearyl Alcohol, Hydroxyacetophenone, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Menthol, Caprylyl Glycol, Lactic Acid, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea Butter), Betaine, Sodium Hyaluronate

page_json.description: Aveeno. Anti Bacterial Body Wash: Use as a body wash, rinse, and shave, to prevent bacteria. Watsons Official Store: Available on amazon only sells for a variety of products. Sells sells separately. Aveeno Oat Moisturizer: The body wash is made with oatmeal and that's good for sensitive skin, nourishes and retains its moisture, leaving a soft, smooth, and silky smooth touch. It's easy to rinse and won't leave behind. Aveeno Eczema Therapy: A moisturizing barrier that moisturizes the skin to help reduce skin irritation, rash. Esemtan Skin Cleanser: A cleanser, cleans the skin, and hydrates the skin. Helps replenish and lock in skin's natural moisture. Lightly Scented. Soap free. Dye free. Suitable for Sensitive Skin. The bundle consist of: Aveeno Daily Moisturizing Body Wash 1L x 3. This breakthrough formula combines ACTIVE NATURALS® Colloidal Oatmeal with natural oils and rich emollients to lock in moisture for softer, smoother skin. Lightly scented, soap-free and dye-free

3164848325.title: MOLTON BROWN Orange & Bergamot Bath & Shower Gel (300ml) Body Wash from Lastey | SG Ready Stock
3164848325.detail_text: MOLTON BROWN Orange & Bergamot Bath & Shower Gel (300ml) Body Wash 300ml Our original iconic shower gel, vibrantly filled with uplifting notes of fresh orange, blossoming neroli and enduring musk. Cruelty Free 100% Vegetarian Free From Parabens Made In England Refillable Packaging The Fragrance A Sevillian courtyard of sun-dappled citrus trees. Lively airs of sweet orange, sparkling bergamot and blossoming neroli dance a scented flamenco. Green, vibrant galbanum and opulent ylang-ylang slip into enduring musk. Awaken your spirits; uplift with our modern classic, plucked from the naranja grove. Signature. Radiant. Unmistakable. Meet The Perfumer Beverley Bayne, Master Perfumer Hugely fascinated by nature, Beverly draws much of her creative inspiration from the colour, light and aromas of the landscape around her. She sees perfumery as an emotional process; each of her fragrances reflect a little part of herself. Did You Know? A vibrant metropolis where old-meets-new, Seville is the inspiration behind our cult icon; this Andalusian suntrap is home to the most bitter orange trees in the world – 14,000 of these perfume its streets or ‘calles’.
3164848325.detail_html:
MOLTON BROWN Orange & Bergamot Bath & Shower Gel (300ml) Body Wash

300ml

Our original iconic shower gel, vibrantly filled with uplifting notes of fresh orange, blossoming neroli and enduring musk.

Cruelty Free
100% Vegetarian
Free From Parabens
Made In England
Refillable Packaging

The Fragrance
A Sevillian courtyard of sun-dappled citrus trees. Lively airs of sweet orange, sparkling bergamot and blossoming neroli dance a scented flamenco. Green, vibrant galbanum and opulent ylang-ylang slip into enduring musk. Awaken your spirits; uplift with our modern classic, plucked from the naranja grove.

Signature. Radiant. Unmistakable.

Meet The Perfumer
Beverley Bayne, Master Perfumer
Hugely fascinated by nature, Beverly draws much of her creative inspiration from the colour, light and aromas of the landscape around her. She sees perfumery as an emotional process; each of her fragrances reflect a little part of herself.

Did You Know?
A vibrant metropolis where old-meets-new, Seville is the inspiration behind our cult icon; this Andalusian suntrap is home to the most bitter orange trees in the world – 14,000 of these perfume its streets or ‘calles’.

13753087539.detail_text: [KIRONA SCENT OFFICIAL STORE] • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • Grand Philo Body Wash (35ml, 220ml, 450ml) Inspired by The Ritz-Carlton Hotel's shower gel, the Grand Philo Perfumed Body Wash offers a gentle yet effective cleanse that helps remove impurities without stripping the skin of its natural moisture, leaving it feeling soft, smooth, and comfortable. The green freshness of fig leaves and earthy depth of white woods evoke an instant connection to nature. Together with the nuttiness of coconut, this blend is perfect for those who enjoy nature's tranquility. • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • INGREDIENTS Body wash: Water (Aqua), Ammonium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropy1 Betaine, Potassium Cocoyl Glycinate, Sodium Chloride, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Fragrance, Sodium Citrate, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Hydroxymethylglycinate, Citric Acid Hand wash: Water (Aqua), Ammonium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropy1 Betaine, Sodium Chloride, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Potassium Cocoyl Glycinate, Fragrance, Sodium Citrate, Potassium Sorbate, Chloroxylenol, PEG-120 Methyl Glucose Trioleate, Sodium Hydroxymethylglycinate, Citric Acid
13753087539.detail_html:
[KIRONA SCENT OFFICIAL STORE]

• • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • •

Grand Philo Body Wash (35ml, 220ml, 450ml)

Inspired by The Ritz-Carlton Hotel's shower gel, the Grand Philo Perfumed Body Wash offers a gentle yet effective cleanse that helps remove impurities without stripping the skin of its natural moisture, leaving it feeling soft, smooth, and comfortable.

The green freshness of fig leaves and earthy depth of white woods evoke an instant connection to nature. Together with the nuttiness of coconut, this blend is perfect for those who enjoy nature's tranquility.

• • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • •

• • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • •

INGREDIENTS

Body wash:

Water (Aqua), Ammonium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropy1 Betaine, Potassium Cocoyl Glycinate, Sodium Chloride, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Fragrance, Sodium Citrate, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Hydroxymethylglycinate, Citric Acid

Hand wash:

Water (Aqua), Ammonium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropy1 Betaine, Sodium Chloride, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Potassium Cocoyl Glycinate, Fragrance, Sodium Citrate, Potassium Sorbate, Chloroxylenol, PEG-120 Methyl Glucose Trioleate, Sodium Hydroxymethylglycinate, Citric Acid

page_json.description: [KIRONA SCENT OFFICIAL STORE]• • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • •Grand Philo Body Wash (35ml, 220ml, 450ml)Inspired by The Ritz-Carlton Hotel's shower gel, the Grand Philo Perfumed Body Wash offers a gentle yet effective cleanse that helps remove impurities without stripping the skin of its natural moisture, leaving it feeling soft, smooth, and comfortable.The green freshness of fig leaves and earthy depth of white woods evoke an instant connection to nature. Together with the nuttiness of coconut, this blend is perfect for those who enjoy nature's tranquility.• • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • •    • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • INGREDIENTSBody wash:Water (Aqua), Ammonium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropy1 Betaine, Potassium Cocoyl Glycinate, Sodium Chloride, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Fragrance, Sodium Citrate, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Hydroxymethylglycinate, Citric AcidHand wash:Water (Aqua), Ammonium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropy1 Betaine, Sodium Chloride, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Potassium Cocoyl Glycinate, Fragrance, Sodium Citrate, Potassium Sorbate, Chloroxylenol, PEG-120 Methyl Glucose Trioleate, Sodium Hydroxymethylglycinate, Citric Acid

1931366876.title: Dr.Enzyme Therapy Body Wash
1931366876.detail_text: Specifications BrandDr.ENZYMESKU1931366876_SGAMZ-12573249948Special ClaimsAnti-bacterialFormulation FeaturesEnzyme-basedSkin TypeAll TypesIngredient PreferenceenzymeBrand ClassificationMassBody Care BenefitsAnti-Bacterial,Exfoliating,OthersPack SizeSingle ItemProduct FormLiquidModelBody Wash What’s in the box 1 x Dr.Enzyme Body Wash 500ml Description Principle for Cleansers Taking its roots and principles in Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM), the plant-based cleansers of Dr.Enzyme differ fundamentally with common soaps. Dr.Enzyme’s approach to cleansing is a paradigm shift. The common soaps use ingredients like sulfates as cleaning agents. They clean effectively, unfortunately, the moisture and microbiome of our skin and hair is stripped in the process, disrupting the healthy metabolism. Dr.Enzyme’s cleaning agents are alive. Live plant enzymes cleanse mindfully while supporting the skin and hair’s health and balance, restoring and regenerating our natural microbiome and barrier. The plants undergo a fermentation process of six months to one year, and are combined with hints of essential oils that serve for each product’s unique formulation. One could be unexpectedly surprised by the delicate, subtle scent of Dr.Enzyme’s secret herb cabinet. Product Description Dr. Enzyme Body Wash uses enzymes to restore our skin's natural microbiome and barrier while gently cleansing. The ancestral herbology formula comes to life over a one-year fermentation process. Restores the natural, healthy metabolism of our skin while nourishing and rejuvenating the body. Shake before use. “Soap Free” Fermented Plants Cleansers . Dr.Enzyme cleansers are “soap-free”. Our cleansing ingredients are fermented botanicals (soapnuts, tea seeds and honeylocust are the cleansing trio basis of all our cleansers). You may find these plants unfamiliar, however the Chinese civilization have used them for centuries before the introduction of fat+lye based soap post Industrial Revolution. We want to bring back the ancient, natural way of cleansing, inspired by our ancestors, adapted to modern living. It is gentle enough for daily cleansing ritual yet without stripping our skin's natural barrier. Suitable for eczema skin too! Ingredients: Purified water, enzyme extracts of tea seed, honeylocust, soapnut, pomelo peel, orange peel, rose, mugwort , dandelion, lychee, pitaya, pineapple peel, banana, honeysuckle. SLMI, glycerin, coco-betaine, salt, xanthan gum, baking soda. Essential oils of rose, ylang ylang, tea tree. Special Remarks Shake well before using as product contains enzyme residues. Each batch is slightly different due to the active fermentation. Precautions Unisex, Suitable for all skin types and ages. If you want to report an issue with this item Click Here

3299845049.title: Sukin Botanical Body Wash, Ylang Ylang & Cedar 1L, Hydrating Shampoo | Hydrate, Soften The Skin [Baebear]
3299845049.detail_text: Sukin Botanical Body Wash is a soap-free Botanical Body Wash is enriched with aromatic botanicals and oils to gently cleanse and purify the body without drying. Sukin Naturals has the best natural body wash, with natural ingredients and scents to delight your senses. Our natural body wash is soap free and paraben free, and formulated to cleanse gently and effectively. Signature Scent (Original/Art Series - Anna Cole/Arkie): A combination of Rosehip, Jojoba and Avocado Oils soften and lightly hydrate while Chamomile and Aloe Vera soothes the skin. Our signature scents is a beautiful blend of Mandarin, Tangerine, Vanillin & Lavender Ylang Ylang & Cedar Jojoba, Sunflower & Camellia Oils are combined to purify, hydrate and soften the skin. With calming Aloe Vera, skin is left feeling soothed and lightly hydrated. Peach Perfect: Gentle Citrus notes fill the shower to envelop your senses connecting you to the perfect dusky pink sunset, tranquil sea waters and the softest sea breeze. Formulated with Kakadu Plum and Australian Hibiscus Extract to hydrate the skin, while calming Aloe Vera leaves skin feeling soothed. Coconut Bliss: A decadent and soft Coconut & Vanilla blend envelop you whilst you wash, invoking feelings of Caribbean holidays, warm weather, cool drinks and soft sand. Formulated with Kakadu Plum and Australian Hibiscus Extract to hydrate the skin, while calming Aloe Vera leaves skin feeling soothed Melon Delight: Zesty Lemon and Ripe Cantaloupe Melon envelop you to electrify and enliven the senses whilst you wash. A sweet, decadent and ready to party experience. Formulated with Kakadu Plum and Australian Hibiscus Extracts to hydrate the skin, while calming Aloe Vera leaves skin feeling soothed. Sukin Natural Deodorant is an aluminium-free deodorant that provides a natural option for preventing unwanted odour. A blend of Aloe Vera, Burdock and Nettle Extract help to cool and soothe skin after shaving, while added zinc helps to prevent bacteria growth, keeping you smelling fresh! We know that nature provides all we need to nourish our skin, so that’s all we put into our natural deodorant range. No false promises, no harmful processes, just organic deodorant ingredients that work. Refresh your senses with our Fresh Cotton and Ocean Mist natural deodorants. Or reach for a classic with our Signature scent instead. All contained in our ergonomic 125ml spray bottles, so they are perfect for any bag shape or size. Signature Citrus and Aromatic Oils including Tangerine, Mandarin, Lavender and Vanillin provide a fresh aroma and leave you feeling clean and refreshed. Ocean Mist Refreshing natural fragrances of Marine Accord, Mint, Violet & Driftwood to leave you feeling clean and renewed. Fresh Cotton Crisp natural fragrances of powdery Cotton, Lily, Jasmine & Cedarwood to leave you feeling clean and refreshed. TIP: If you have been using an antiperspirant it can take a few weeks for the armpit to detox, so keep up with it! Keep in mind you will still perspire with a natural deodorant, but it will be odour free. We recommend a patch test before use as it is not recommended for sensitive skin.
3299845049.detail_html:
Sukin Botanical Body Wash is a soap-free Botanical Body Wash is enriched with aromatic botanicals and oils to gently cleanse and purify the body without drying. Sukin Naturals has the best natural body wash, with natural ingredients and scents to delight your senses. Our natural body wash is soap free and paraben free, and formulated to cleanse gently and effectively.


Signature Scent (Original/Art Series - Anna Cole/Arkie): 

A combination of Rosehip, Jojoba and Avocado Oils soften and lightly hydrate while Chamomile and Aloe Vera soothes the skin. Our signature scents is a beautiful blend of Mandarin, Tangerine, Vanillin & Lavender


Ylang Ylang & Cedar

Jojoba, Sunflower & Camellia Oils are combined to purify, hydrate and soften the skin. With calming Aloe Vera, skin is left feeling soothed and lightly hydrated.


Peach Perfect: 

Gentle Citrus notes fill the shower to envelop your senses connecting you to the perfect dusky pink sunset, tranquil sea waters and the softest sea breeze. Formulated with Kakadu Plum and Australian Hibiscus Extract to hydrate the skin, while calming Aloe Vera leaves skin feeling soothed.


Coconut Bliss: 

A decadent and soft Coconut & Vanilla blend envelop you whilst you wash, invoking feelings of Caribbean holidays, warm weather, cool drinks and soft sand. Formulated with Kakadu Plum and Australian Hibiscus Extract to hydrate the skin, while calming Aloe Vera leaves skin feeling soothed


Melon Delight:

Zesty Lemon and Ripe Cantaloupe Melon envelop you to electrify and enliven the senses whilst you wash. A sweet, decadent and ready to party experience. Formulated with Kakadu Plum and Australian Hibiscus Extracts to hydrate the skin, while calming Aloe Vera leaves skin feeling soothed. 


Sukin Natural Deodorant is an aluminium-free deodorant that provides a natural option for preventing unwanted odour. A blend of Aloe Vera, Burdock and Nettle Extract help to cool and soothe skin after shaving, while added zinc helps to prevent bacteria growth, keeping you smelling fresh!


We know that nature provides all we need to nourish our skin, so that’s all we put into our natural deodorant range. No false promises, no harmful processes, just organic deodorant ingredients that work. Refresh your senses with our Fresh Cotton and Ocean Mist natural deodorants. Or reach for a classic with our Signature scent instead. All contained in our ergonomic 125ml spray bottles, so they are perfect for any bag shape or size. 


Signature

Citrus and Aromatic Oils including Tangerine, Mandarin, Lavender and Vanillin provide a fresh aroma and leave you feeling clean and refreshed.


Ocean Mist

Refreshing natural fragrances of Marine Accord, Mint, Violet & Driftwood to leave you feeling clean and renewed.


Fresh Cotton

Crisp natural fragrances of powdery Cotton, Lily, Jasmine & Cedarwood to leave you feeling clean and refreshed.


TIP: If you have been using an antiperspirant it can take a few weeks for the armpit to detox, so keep up with it! Keep in mind you will still perspire with a natural deodorant, but it will be odour free. We recommend a patch test before use as it is not recommended for sensitive skin.

Or reach for a classic with our Signature scent instead. All contained in our ergonomic 125ml spray bottles, so they are perfect for any bag shape or size. Signature Citrus and Aromatic Oils including Tangerine, Mandarin, Lavender and Vanillin provide a fresh aroma and leave you feeling clean and refreshed. Ocean Mist Refreshing natural fragrances of Marine Accord, Mint, Violet & Driftwood to leave you feeling clean and renewed. Fresh Cotton Crisp natural fragrances of powdery Cotton, Lily, Jasmine & Cedarwood to leave you feeling clean and refreshed. TIP: If you have been using an antiperspirant it can take a few weeks for the armpit to detox, so keep up with it! Keep in mind you will still perspire with a natural deodorant, but it will be odour free. We recommend a patch test before use as it is not recommended for sensitive skin.

product.desc:
Sukin Botanical Body Wash is a soap-free Botanical Body Wash is enriched with aromatic botanicals and oils to gently cleanse and purify the body without drying. Sukin Naturals has the best natural body wash, with natural ingredients and scents to delight your senses. Our natural body wash is soap free and paraben free, and formulated to cleanse gently and effectively.


Signature Scent (Original/Art Series - Anna Cole/Arkie): 

A combination of Rosehip, Jojoba and Avocado Oils soften and lightly hydrate while Chamomile and Aloe Vera soothes the skin. Our signature scents is a beautiful blend of Mandarin, Tangerine, Vanillin & Lavender


Ylang Ylang & Cedar

Jojoba, Sunflower & Camellia Oils are combined to purify, hydrate and soften the skin. With calming Aloe Vera, skin is left feeling soothed and lightly hydrated.


Peach Perfect: 

Gentle Citrus notes fill the shower to envelop your senses connecting you to the perfect dusky pink sunset, tranquil sea waters and the softest sea breeze. Formulated with Kakadu Plum and Australian Hibiscus Extract to hydrate the skin, while calming Aloe Vera leaves skin feeling soothed.


Coconut Bliss: 

A decadent and soft Coconut & Vanilla blend envelop you whilst you wash, invoking feelings of Caribbean holidays, warm weather, cool drinks and soft sand. Formulated with Kakadu Plum and Australian Hibiscus Extract to hydrate the skin, while calming Aloe Vera leaves skin feeling soothed


Melon Delight:

Zesty Lemon and Ripe Cantaloupe Melon envelop you to electrify and enliven the senses whilst you wash. A sweet, decadent and ready to party experience. Formulated with Kakadu Plum and Australian Hibiscus Extracts to hydrate the skin, while calming Aloe Vera leaves skin feeling soothed. 


Sukin Natural Deodorant is an aluminium-free deodorant that provides a natural option for preventing unwanted odour. A blend of Aloe Vera, Burdock and Nettle Extract help to cool and soothe skin after shaving, while added zinc helps to prevent bacteria growth, keeping you smelling fresh!


We know that nature provides all we need to nourish our skin, so that’s all we put into our natural deodorant range. No false promises, no harmful processes, just organic deodorant ingredients that work. Refresh your senses with our Fresh Cotton and Ocean Mist natural deodorants. Or reach for a classic with our Signature scent instead. All contained in our ergonomic 125ml spray bottles, so they are perfect for any bag shape or size. 


Signature

Citrus and Aromatic Oils including Tangerine, Mandarin, Lavender and Vanillin provide a fresh aroma and leave you feeling clean and refreshed.


Ocean Mist

Refreshing natural fragrances of Marine Accord, Mint, Violet & Driftwood to leave you feeling clean and renewed.


Fresh Cotton

Crisp natural fragrances of powdery Cotton, Lily, Jasmine & Cedarwood to leave you feeling clean and refreshed.


TIP: If you have been using an antiperspirant it can take a few weeks for the armpit to detox, so keep up with it! Keep in mind you will still perspire with a natural deodorant, but it will be odour free. We recommend a patch test before use as it is not recommended for sensitive skin.

13752435477.title: 100% Original C𝗲r𝗮v𝗲 - Hydrating Body Wash & SA Body Wash 296ml & Soothing Body Wash 296ml
13752435477.detail_text: Cerave SA Body Wash for Rough & Bumpy Skin 296ml Provides gentle, non-irritating cleansing plus exfoliation to improve skin texture without harsh microbeads that can scratch the skin. In addition, Salicylic Acid body wash features Niacinamide to soothe the skin, Hyaluronic Acid to retain the skin’s natural moisture and three essential Ceramide to maintain the skin’s protective barrier. Benefits : Gently exfoliates with Salicylic acid MVE Technology: This patented delivery system continually releases moisturizing ingredients for 24-hour hydration Ceramides: Help restore and maintain the skin’s natural barrier Hyaluronic acid: Helps retain the skin’s natural moisture Niacinamide: Helps calm skin Non-comedogenic, fragrance-free and paraben-free Developed with Dermatologists Cerave Hydrating Body Wash 296ml A foaming cleanser with Ceramides and Hyaluronic Acid that can gently cleanse and comfort while helping it attract and retain moisture. Developed with Dermatologists to cleanse and refresh the skin while restoring the skin’s natural barrier. In addition to three essential Ceramides and Hyaluronic acid, this foaming cleanser for the body includes emollients to moisturize and soften the skin all day. Non-comedogenic, paraben-free, sulfate-free and soap-free. Accepted by the National Eczema Association. This non-irritating, gentle cleanser formula is suitable for normal to dry skin. Cerave Soothing Body Wash 296ml Body Wash for very dry skin and eczema has an ultra-gentle formula that cleanses, helps maintain the skin barrier and comforts the skin. Ultra-gentle body wash formula. Effectively cleanses as it soothes skin with Omega oils. Helps restore the skin's protective barrier with Ceramides. Helps attract moisture to dry skin with Hyaluronic Acid. Suitable for sensitive, extra-dry, itchy and eczema-prone skin How to use: Wet skin with lukewarm water. Massage body wash into skin in a gentle, circular motion. Rinse
13752435477.detail_html:
Cerave SA Body Wash for Rough & Bumpy Skin 296ml

Provides gentle, non-irritating cleansing plus exfoliation to improve skin texture without harsh microbeads that can scratch the skin. In addition, Salicylic Acid body wash features Niacinamide to soothe the skin, Hyaluronic Acid to retain the skin’s natural moisture and three essential Ceramide to maintain the skin’s protective barrier.

Benefits :

Gently exfoliates with Salicylic acid

MVE Technology: This patented delivery system continually releases moisturizing ingredients for 24-hour hydration

Ceramides: Help restore and maintain the skin’s natural barrier

Hyaluronic acid: Helps retain the skin’s natural moisture

Niacinamide: Helps calm skin

Non-comedogenic, fragrance-free and paraben-free

Developed with Dermatologists

Cerave Hydrating Body Wash 296ml

A foaming cleanser with Ceramides and Hyaluronic Acid that can gently cleanse and comfort while helping it attract and retain moisture.

Developed with Dermatologists to cleanse and refresh the skin while restoring the skin’s natural barrier. In addition to three essential Ceramides and Hyaluronic acid, this foaming cleanser for the body includes emollients to moisturize and soften the skin all day.

Non-comedogenic, paraben-free, sulfate-free and soap-free. Accepted by the National Eczema Association.

This non-irritating, gentle cleanser formula is suitable for normal to dry skin.

Cerave Soothing Body Wash 296ml

Body Wash for very dry skin and eczema has an ultra-gentle formula that cleanses, helps maintain the skin barrier and comforts the skin.

Ultra-gentle body wash formula. Effectively cleanses as it soothes skin with Omega oils. Helps restore the skin's protective barrier with Ceramides. Helps attract moisture to dry skin with Hyaluronic Acid.

Suitable for sensitive, extra-dry, itchy and eczema-prone skin

How to use:

Wet skin with lukewarm water. Massage body wash into skin in a gentle, circular motion. Rinse

product.desc:
Cerave SA Body Wash for Rough & Bumpy Skin 296ml

Provides gentle, non-irritating cleansing plus exfoliation to improve skin texture without harsh microbeads that can scratch the skin. In addition, Salicylic Acid body wash features Niacinamide to soothe the skin, Hyaluronic Acid to retain the skin’s natural moisture and three essential Ceramide to maintain the skin’s protective barrier.

Benefits :

Gently exfoliates with Salicylic acid

MVE Technology: This patented delivery system continually releases moisturizing ingredients for 24-hour hydration

Ceramides: Help restore and maintain the skin’s natural barrier

Hyaluronic acid: Helps retain the skin’s natural moisture

Niacinamide: Helps calm skin

Non-comedogenic, fragrance-free and paraben-free

Developed with Dermatologists

Cerave Hydrating Body Wash 296ml

A foaming cleanser with Ceramides and Hyaluronic Acid that can gently cleanse and comfort while helping it attract and retain moisture.

Developed with Dermatologists to cleanse and refresh the skin while restoring the skin’s natural barrier. In addition to three essential Ceramides and Hyaluronic acid, this foaming cleanser for the body includes emollients to moisturize and soften the skin all day.

Non-comedogenic, paraben-free, sulfate-free and soap-free. Accepted by the National Eczema Association.

This non-irritating, gentle cleanser formula is suitable for normal to dry skin.

Cerave Soothing Body Wash 296ml

Body Wash for very dry skin and eczema has an ultra-gentle formula that cleanses, helps maintain the skin barrier and comforts the skin.

Ultra-gentle body wash formula. Effectively cleanses as it soothes skin with Omega oils. Helps restore the skin's protective barrier with Ceramides. Helps attract moisture to dry skin with Hyaluronic Acid.

Suitable for sensitive, extra-dry, itchy and eczema-prone skin

How to use:

Wet skin with lukewarm water. Massage body wash into skin in a gentle, circular motion. Rinse

1935758963.title: St Ives Soothing Oatmeal Shea Butter Body Wash 650ml - For Smooth Glowing Skin
1935758963.detail_text: St Ives Soothing Oatmeal Shea Butter Body Wash 650ml St. Ives Soothing Oatmeal & Shea Butter Body Wash is a must-have for those seeking a calming and moisturizing shower experience. Made with 100% natural oatmeal and shea butter extracts, this body wash provides a luxurious lather that cleanses and soothes the skin. Not only does it effectively wash away dirt and bacteria, but it also leaves your skin feeling soft and nourished. It's gentle on the skin and perfect for daily use. The formula is paraben-free and dermatologist tested, making it safe for all skin types. The body wash bottle is made from 100% recycled plastic, making it an eco-friendly choice. Shea butter is an excellent emollient and known for its skin-soothing qualities. Oatmeal, on the other hand, is great for soothing and calming the skin. The natural extracts are finely milled, ground, soaked, and filtered to get all the skin-calming goodness. Direction To use, pour a generous amount of body wash onto your hands or favorite squishy pouf, lather over wet skin, soak up the incredible scent, and rinse off when done. It's that simple! St. Ives offers a variety of other body wash variants that cater to different skin types and needs. Check out our other products, including Exfoliating Body Wash, Revitalizing Acai, Blueberry & Chia Seed Oil Body Wash, and Refreshing Body Wash Coconut & Orchid, among others.

13762902282.detail_text: 【296ml Body Wash | Available in Moisturizing, SA, and Soothing Formulas】 Does your skin feel dry, rough, tight, or uncomfortable after showering? This body wash series is perfect for daily use. It gently cleanses away oil and dirt, while offering moisturizing, smoothing, or soothing care to suit different skin needs, leaving skin feeling refreshed and soft after washing. ✨ Product Highlights ✔ 296ml size, perfect for daily showering ✔ Hydrating: Suitable for dry, dehydrated skin ✔ SA: Suitable for rough, grainy, or keratosis pilaris-like skin ✔ Soothing: Suitable for dry, sensitive, and seasonally unstable skin ✔ Gentle cleansing, doesn't leave skin feeling tight after washing ✔ Suitable for daily body care, a practical bathroom essential 🌿 Suitable for: People with dry, rough, flaky skin, keratosis pilaris, oily back, sensitive and itchy skin, unstable skin during seasonal changes, and those who want gentle body cleansing and care. 💧 How to use: Apply an appropriate amount to damp skin during showering, gently massage to lather, and rinse thoroughly. SA version is recommended for use as needed. Beginners or those with sensitive skin can start with 2-3 times per week to build tolerance. ⚠ Important Notes: Sensitive skin is advised to perform a patch test first. SA version contains skin-renewing ingredients; please moisturize during use. Avoid use on open wounds or severely damaged skin. Discontinue use if discomfort occurs.

page_json.name: 【 Hot selling 】 CeraVe Hydrating SA & Soothing Body Wash 296ml | Moisturizing Body Cleanser
page_json.description: 【296ml Body Wash | Available in Moisturizing, SA, and Soothing Formulas】Does your skin feel dry, rough, tight, or uncomfortable after showering? This body wash series is perfect for daily use. It gently cleanses away oil and dirt, while offering moisturizing, smoothing, or soothing care to suit different skin needs, leaving skin feeling refreshed and soft after washing.✨ Product Highlights✔ 296ml size, perfect for daily showering✔ Hydrating: Suitable for dry, dehydrated skin✔ SA: Suitable for rough, grainy, or keratosis pilaris-like skin✔ Soothing: Suitable for dry, sensitive, and seasonally unstable skin✔ Gentle cleansing, doesn't leave skin feeling tight after washing✔ Suitable for daily body care, a practical bathroom essential🌿 Suitable for: People with dry, rough, flaky skin, keratosis pilaris, oily back, sensitive and itchy skin, unstable skin during seasonal changes, and those who want gentle body cleansing and care.💧 How to use: Apply an appropriate amount to damp skin during showering, gently massage to lather, and rinse thoroughly. SA version is recommended for use as needed. Beginners or those with sensitive skin can start with 2-3 times per week to build tolerance.⚠ Important Notes: Sensitive skin is advised to perform a patch test first. SA version contains skin-renewing ingredients; please moisturize during use. Avoid use on open wounds or severely damaged skin. Discontinue use if discomfort occurs.

3025618448.detail_html:
Brightening

Diane Perfect Beauty Protect Body Wash removes 99.9% of all germs in a single wash. Long lasting grapefruit and amber fragrance with 24 hour hydration. Formulated with cluconolactone, this is a perfect choice for users looking for skin brightening body wash that smells and works great!

- 99.9% Anti-Bacterial

- 24 Hour Hydration

- Long Lasting Fragrances

- For Brightening Skin

Dry Skin

Diane Perfect Beauty Protect Body Wash removes 99.9% of all germs in a single wash. Long lasting green tea and rose fragrance with 24 hour hydration. Formulated with aloe vera extract and sodium PCA, this is a perfect choice for users looking for body wash suitable for dry skin that smells and works great!

- 99.9% Anti-Bacterial

- 24 Hour Hydration

- Long Lasting Fragrances

- For Dry Skin

Active Deo

Diane Perfect Beauty Protect Body Wash removes 99.9% of all germs in a single wash. Long lasting pomelo and muguet fragrance with 24 hour hydration. Formulated with mix plant extract for deodorant balance and control sebum secretion, this is a perfect choice for users with active lifestyles!

- 99.9% Anti-Bacterial

- 24 Hour Hydration

- Long Lasting Fragrances

- For Active Deo

Fresh & Cool

Diane Perfect Beauty Protect Body Wash removes 99.9% of all germs in a single wash. Long lasting peppermint and freesia fragrance with 24 hour hydration. Formulated with menthol extract, this is a perfect choice for users looking for cooling and refreshing body wash that smells and works great!

- 99.9% Anti-Bacterial

- 24 Hour Hydration

- Long Lasting Fragrances

- For Fresh & Cool

Family Protect

Diane Perfect Beauty Protect Body Wash Family Protect is specially formulated for the whole family with a unique gentle hydration formula that washes away 99.9% of bacteria while keeping skin moisturized and comfortable. Enriched with nourishing Centella Asiatica, Chamomile, and Rosemary extracts, it protects and soothes even sensitive skin with a non-sticky finish that rinses off easily.

This gentle vegan formula is free from: Parabens, Phthalates, Animal-derived ingredients, and Artificial colorants. Coupled with Diane's special scent technology, one can now enjoy long-lasting fragrances throughout the day.

Effectively eliminates bacteria with gentle cleansing ingredient, O-Cymen-5-OL, while keeping your skin hydrated. Alcohol-free for gentle care.*

*Except Active Deo variant

- Effectively removes 99.9% of bacteria for everyday protection.

- Enriched with Centella, Chamomile & Rosemary to soothe sensitive skin.

- Keeps skin hydrated and nourished with long-lasting moisture.

- Gentle, non-sticky formula suitable for the whole family.

brand.name: Moist Diane
brand.suggestion: More Personal Care from Moist Diane

product.desc:
Brightening

Diane Perfect Beauty Protect Body Wash removes 99.9% of all germs in a single wash. Long lasting grapefruit and amber fragrance with 24 hour hydration. Formulated with cluconolactone, this is a perfect choice for users looking for skin brightening body wash that smells and works great!

- 99.9% Anti-Bacterial

- 24 Hour Hydration

- Long Lasting Fragrances

- For Brightening Skin

Dry Skin

Diane Perfect Beauty Protect Body Wash removes 99.9% of all germs in a single wash. Long lasting green tea and rose fragrance with 24 hour hydration. Formulated with aloe vera extract and sodium PCA, this is a perfect choice for users looking for body wash suitable for dry skin that smells and works great!

- 99.9% Anti-Bacterial

- 24 Hour Hydration

- Long Lasting Fragrances

- For Dry Skin

Active Deo

Diane Perfect Beauty Protect Body Wash removes 99.9% of all germs in a single wash. Long lasting pomelo and muguet fragrance with 24 hour hydration. Formulated with mix plant extract for deodorant balance and control sebum secretion, this is a perfect choice for users with active lifestyles!

- 99.9% Anti-Bacterial

- 24 Hour Hydration

- Long Lasting Fragrances

- For Active Deo

Fresh & Cool

Diane Perfect Beauty Protect Body Wash removes 99.9% of all germs in a single wash. Long lasting peppermint and freesia fragrance with 24 hour hydration. Formulated with menthol extract, this is a perfect choice for users looking for cooling and refreshing body wash that smells and works great!

- 99.9% Anti-Bacterial

- 24 Hour Hydration

- Long Lasting Fragrances

- For Fresh & Cool

Family Protect

Diane Perfect Beauty Protect Body Wash Family Protect is specially formulated for the whole family with a unique gentle hydration formula that washes away 99.9% of bacteria while keeping skin moisturized and comfortable. Enriched with nourishing Centella Asiatica, Chamomile, and Rosemary extracts, it protects and soothes even sensitive skin with a non-sticky finish that rinses off easily.

This gentle vegan formula is free from: Parabens, Phthalates, Animal-derived ingredients, and Artificial colorants. Coupled with Diane's special scent technology, one can now enjoy long-lasting fragrances throughout the day.

Effectively eliminates bacteria with gentle cleansing ingredient, O-Cymen-5-OL, while keeping your skin hydrated. Alcohol-free for gentle care.*

*Except Active Deo variant

- Effectively removes 99.9% of bacteria for everyday protection.

- Enriched with Centella, Chamomile & Rosemary to soothe sensitive skin.

- Keeps skin hydrated and nourished with long-lasting moisture.

- Gentle, non-sticky formula suitable for the whole family.

3435627015.title: [200m] Herbal Pharm Aleppo Soap Shower Gel - 100% Natural & Vegan Body Wash for Hydrated Skin
3435627015.detail_text: 🌟 Ancient Wisdom, Modern Purity: Herbal Pharm Aleppo Soap Shower Gel (200ml) The World’s Oldest Soap Secret, Now in a Luxurious Liquid Wash! 🌿✨ Step into a tradition of purity that dates back over 2,000 years. Herbal Pharm Aleppo Soap Shower Gel brings the legendary skin-healing benefits of the original Aleppo soap to your modern shower routine. Crafted with a 100% natural and vegan formula, this liquid soap combines the deep-cleansing power of Laurel Oil with the intense hydration of Olive Oil. Perfect for those who seek a chemical-free lifestyle, it transforms your daily wash into a soothing, spa-like ritual that leaves skin soft, balanced, and radiantly healthy. Key Selling Points 🧬 Authentic 100% Natural Formula: Free from synthetic detergents (SLS/SLES), parabens, and artificial fragrances—just pure, plant-based goodness. 🛡️ Therapeutic Laurel Oil: Renowned for its natural antibacterial and antifungal properties, it helps soothe irritated skin and combat acne or fungal stresses. 🔬 Liquid Gold Olive Oil: Rich in Vitamins A and E, it provides deep, long-lasting hydration, ensuring your skin never feels "tight" or stripped after a shower. ⚡ pH Balanced for Sensitivity: Gentle enough for the most reactive skin types, including those prone to eczema, psoriasis, or dermatitis. 🌿 Eco-Conscious & Vegan: Cruelty-free and biodegradable, making it as kind to the planet as it is to your body. Benefits Hydrates While It Cleanses: Unlike conventional body washes that use harsh chemicals, this gel preserves your skin's natural lipid barrier. Calms Inflamed Skin: The soothing properties of Laurel Oil make it an excellent choice for calming redness and itchiness. Versatile Use: Its pure formula is so gentle it can be used for the hands, body, and even as a natural facial cleanser for oily/combination skin. Distinctive Natural Scent: Features the earthy, clean aroma of natural laurel and olive—no cloying artificial perfumes. How to Use In the Shower: Pour a small amount onto a sponge, washcloth, or your palms. Lather: Massage into wet skin. Note that natural soaps produce a finer, creamier lather compared to chemical-based foaming agents. Rinse: Rinse off thoroughly with warm water. Pro-Tip: Follow up with a light natural moisturizer to lock in the nutrients from the olive oil. Product Specification Brand: Herbal Pharm Product Name: Aleppo Soap Shower Gel Volume: 200ml Main Ingredients: Saponified Olive Oil, Laurel Berry Oil, Water. Certifications: 100% Natural, Vegan, Cruelty-Free. Safety Info: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Store in a cool, dry place. #HerbalPharm #AleppoSoap #NaturalBodyWash #VeganSkinCare #ChemicalFree #LaurelOil #OliveOilSoap #SensitiveSkinCare #GreenBeautySG #ReadyStockSG #EMISplus
3435627015.detail_html:
🌟 Ancient Wisdom, Modern Purity: Herbal Pharm Aleppo Soap Shower Gel (200ml)

The World’s Oldest Soap Secret, Now in a Luxurious Liquid Wash! 🌿✨

Step into a tradition of purity that dates back over 2,000 years. Herbal Pharm Aleppo Soap Shower Gel brings the legendary skin-healing benefits of the original Aleppo soap to your modern shower routine. Crafted with a 100% natural and vegan formula, this liquid soap combines the deep-cleansing power of Laurel Oil with the intense hydration of Olive Oil. Perfect for those who seek a chemical-free lifestyle, it transforms your daily wash into a soothing, spa-like ritual that leaves skin soft, balanced, and radiantly healthy.

Key Selling Points

  • 🧬 Authentic 100% Natural Formula: Free from synthetic detergents (SLS/SLES), parabens, and artificial fragrances—just pure, plant-based goodness.
  • 🛡️ Therapeutic Laurel Oil: Renowned for its natural antibacterial and antifungal properties, it helps soothe irritated skin and combat acne or fungal stresses.
  • 🔬 Liquid Gold Olive Oil: Rich in Vitamins A and E, it provides deep, long-lasting hydration, ensuring your skin never feels "tight" or stripped after a shower.
  • ⚡ pH Balanced for Sensitivity: Gentle enough for the most reactive skin types, including those prone to eczema, psoriasis, or dermatitis.
  • 🌿 Eco-Conscious & Vegan: Cruelty-free and biodegradable, making it as kind to the planet as it is to your body.

Benefits

  • Hydrates While It Cleanses: Unlike conventional body washes that use harsh chemicals, this gel preserves your skin's natural lipid barrier.
  • Calms Inflamed Skin: The soothing properties of Laurel Oil make it an excellent choice for calming redness and itchiness.
  • Versatile Use: Its pure formula is so gentle it can be used for the hands, body, and even as a natural facial cleanser for oily/combination skin.
  • Distinctive Natural Scent: Features the earthy, clean aroma of natural laurel and olive—no cloying artificial perfumes.

How to Use

  • In the Shower: Pour a small amount onto a sponge, washcloth, or your palms.
  • Lather: Massage into wet skin. Note that natural soaps produce a finer, creamier lather compared to chemical-based foaming agents.
  • Rinse: Rinse off thoroughly with warm water.
  • Pro-Tip: Follow up with a light natural moisturizer to lock in the nutrients from the olive oil.

 Product Specification

  • Brand: Herbal Pharm
  • Product Name: Aleppo Soap Shower Gel
  • Volume: 200ml
  • Main Ingredients: Saponified Olive Oil, Laurel Berry Oil, Water.
  • Certifications: 100% Natural, Vegan, Cruelty-Free.
  • Safety Info: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Store in a cool, dry place.

#HerbalPharm #AleppoSoap #NaturalBodyWash #VeganSkinCare #ChemicalFree #LaurelOil #OliveOilSoap #SensitiveSkinCare #GreenBeautySG #ReadyStockSG #EMISplus

👉 [KUNDAL] Pure Body Wash 500ml

✖No parabens, ✖No silicone, ✖No MIT/CMIT

✔️ Contains 23 different natural extracts

✔️ Luxurious fragrance gifts a nice perfumed shower

✔️ Contains 42% Aloe Vera leaf extract

✔️ 3 different vegetable oils enhance moisturizing the skin (Coconut oil, Camellia oil, Jojoba seed oil)

✔️ High Moisturization gives soft and smooth feeling after a shower

✔️ Helps maintain pH balance (pH5.5 weak acid body wash)

✔️ Contains patented ingredient certified in anti-aging function (Beauty tree CC, Biomimetic fluid tears)

✔️ Natural surfactant, rich foam

13761239624.title: Hetras Hotel Therapy Body Wash 1013ML
13761239624.detail_text: Transform your daily shower into a luxurious hotel-like ritual. With premium French fragrances and skin-friendly plant extracts, this body wash provides long-lasting hydration and a lingering subtle scent. Its extra-large 1,013ml size with a unique double-pump design ensures convenience and value for everyday use. How To Use: -Pump an appropriate amount onto a shower towel or sponge. -Rub gently to create a rich lather and massage all over the -body. -Rinse thoroughly with water. -Pat dry with a towel and finish with body lotion for extra hydration and a long-lasting scent. Size: 1013ml
13761239624.detail_html:
Transform your daily shower into a luxurious hotel-like ritual. With premium French fragrances and skin-friendly plant extracts, this body wash provides long-lasting hydration and a lingering subtle scent. 

Its extra-large 1,013ml size with a unique double-pump design ensures convenience and value for everyday use.

 

How To Use:

-Pump an appropriate amount onto a shower towel or sponge.

-Rub gently to create a rich lather and massage all over the -body.

-Rinse thoroughly with water.

-Pat dry with a towel and finish with body lotion for extra hydration and a long-lasting scent.

 

Size: 1013ml

product.desc:
Transform your daily shower into a luxurious hotel-like ritual. With premium French fragrances and skin-friendly plant extracts, this body wash provides long-lasting hydration and a lingering subtle scent. 

Its extra-large 1,013ml size with a unique double-pump design ensures convenience and value for everyday use.

 

How To Use:

-Pump an appropriate amount onto a shower towel or sponge.

-Rub gently to create a rich lather and massage all over the -body.

-Rinse thoroughly with water.

-Pat dry with a towel and finish with body lotion for extra hydration and a long-lasting scent.

 

Size: 1013ml
